CVE-2024-5564.title: A vulnerability was found in libndp. This flaw allows a local mal ...
CVE-2024-5564.summary: A vulnerability was found in libndp. This flaw allows a local malicious user to cause a buffer overflow in NetworkManager, triggered by sending a malformed IPv6 router advertisement packet. This issue occurred as libndp was not correctly validating the route length information.
